title: Simple Grayscale
description: Quick shader with an ON/OFF switch to make everything gray.
body:
**Simple Grayscale** provides a grayscale visual effect for the game. Use the ON/OFF toggle for easy activation.
This allows users to instantly alter the game's visuals for stylistic or atmospheric purposes.

## Shader off:
![Without shader (original colors)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/efRqNWHp/images/e0c1babfa20c6149da4bb1a02c0dbbab3cf3a607.png)

## Shader on:
![With shader (grayscale)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/efRqNWHp/images/5a21ff6acde55397eef16e23946cd6267853e759.png)
